studyName: Paired AML Epigenetics Study on Clonality

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: AML status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: TUMOR_GRADE
variables.description: Leukemia stage of sample (M2, M4, biphenotypic, N/A - see: Cancer.org)

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: The dataset reports when during the stage of illness samples were collected (time of diagnosis/relapse), the time elapsed between sample collection and death, AML stage of samples, and age and gender of subjects.

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Disease onset age

variables.name: Death Time
variables.description: Time between sample obtained and death

variables.name: FAB
variables.description: French - American - British AML classification designation (see: Cancer.org)

variables.name: Relapse Time
variables.description: Time between sample obtained and relapse

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Sample_time
variables.description: Time when sample was taken: D=Diagnosis; R=Relapse

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
